title: Shrimp Toast
description: A simple German-inspired appetizer featuring toasted bread topped with shrimp and crispy crumbs.
instructions: Cut the bread into 1/2-inch thick slices.
Toast the bread slices for 5-7 minutes or until lightly browned.
Melt butter in a pan over medium heat. Add shrimp and cook until pink, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Season shrimp with salt and pepper to taste.
Place toasted bread slices on a baking sheet.
Top each bread slice with a cooked shrimp.
Bake in the preheated oven for 2-3 minutes or until crumbs are golden brown.
